datasets.name: 7b732535
queryLines:
-- Updated coach profile query with new layout

WITH p AS (

  SELECT

    cp.coach_id,

    cp.coach_name,

    cp.nation_name_display,

    cp.flag_emoji,



    cp.games_played_all,

    cp.wins,

    cp.draws,

    cp.losses,

    cp.tournaments_played,

    cp.nations_played,

    cp.opponents_count,

    cp.active_since_year,

    cp.last_active_year,



    cp.global_elo_current,

    cp.global_elo_peak_last_50,

    cp.global_elo_median_all,

    cp.opponent_global_elo_median_weighted,

    cp.world_rank_current,

    cp.nation_rank_current,

    cp.world_rank_peak,

    cp.nation_rank_peak,



    cp.main_race_name,

    cp.main_race_games_played,

    cp.main_race_ppg,

    cp.median_race_ppg,



    cp.best_win_streak,

    cp.current_win_streak,

    cp.best_unbeaten_streak,

    cp.current_unbeaten_streak,



    cp.load_timestamp

  FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_profile cp

),



race_stats AS (

  SELECT

    coach_id,

    COUNT(DISTINCT race_id) AS distinct_races_played

  FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_performance

  WHERE race_id <> 0

    AND games_played > 0

  GROUP BY coach_id

),



last_50_stats AS (

  SELECT

    h.coach_id,

    SUM(CASE WHEN h.result_numeric = 1.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS last50_wins,

    SUM(CASE WHEN h.result_numeric = 0.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS last50_draws,

    SUM(CASE WHEN h.result_numeric = 0.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS last50_losses

  FROM (

    SELECT coach_id, result_numeric,

      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY coach_id ORDER BY game_index DESC) AS rn

    FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_global_elo_rating_history

    WHERE rating_system = 'NAF_ELO'

  ) h

  CROSS JOIN (SELECT CAST(last_n_games_window AS INT) AS n FROM naf_catalog.gold_dim.analytical_config) cfg

  WHERE h.rn <= cfg.n

  GROUP BY h.coach_id

  HAVING COUNT(*) >= MAX(cfg.n)

),



p2 AS (

  SELECT

    p.*,

    COALESCE(rs.distinct_races_played, 0) AS distinct_races_played,

    l50.last50_wins,

    l50.last50_draws,

    l50.last50_losses

  FROM p

  LEFT JOIN race_stats rs

    ON p.coach_id = rs.coach_id

  LEFT JOIN last_50_stats l50

    ON p.coach_id = l50.coach_id
,

selector_ranks AS (
  SELECT
    coach_id,
    selector_rank_global
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.nation_team_candidate_scores
  WHERE selector_focus = 'BALANCED'
))



SELECT

  p2.coach_id,

  row.sort_order,

  row.label,

  row.profile,

  p2.load_timestamp

FROM p2
LEFT JOIN selector_ranks
  ON p2.coach_id = selector_ranks.coach_id
LATERAL VIEW explode(array(

  named_struct('sort_order',  1, 'label', '👤 NAF Name',   'profile', coalesce(p2.coach_name, 'Unknown coach')),

  named_struct('sort_order',  2, 'label', '🔢 NAF Number', 'profile', cast(p2.coach_id as string)),

  named_struct('sort_order',  3, 'label', '🌍 Nation',     'profile', concat(coalesce(p2.flag_emoji, '🌐'), ' ', coalesce(p2.nation_name_display, 'Unknown'))),



  named_struct('sort_order', 10, 'label', '📊 Overview', 'profile', ''),

  named_struct('sort_order', 11, 'label', ' • Total games (all)', 'profile', concat(cast(p2.games_played_all as string), ' (', cast(p2.wins as string), '/', cast(p2.draws as string), '/', cast(p2.losses as string), ')')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 12, 'label', ' • Last 50 games (W/D/L)', 'profile', CASE WHEN p2.last50_wins IS NOT NULL THEN concat(cast(p2.last50_wins as string), '/', cast(p2.last50_draws as string), '/', cast(p2.last50_losses as string)) ELSE 'N/A' END),

  named_struct('sort_order', 13, 'label', ' • Tournaments',       'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.tournaments_played as string), '0')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 14, 'label', ' • Nations played',    'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.nations_played as string), '0')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 15, 'label', ' • Opponents faced',   'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.opponents_count as string), '0')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 16, 'label', ' • Active since / Last active years', 'profile', concat(cast(p2.active_since_year as string), ' / ', cast(p2.last_active_year as string))),



  named_struct('sort_order', 20, 'label', '📈 Ratings', 'profile', ''),

  named_struct('sort_order', 21, 'label', ' • Current GLO',                'profile', coalesce(cast(round(p2.global_elo_current, 1) as string), 'N/A')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 22, 'label', ' • Peak GLO (last 50)',         'profile', coalesce(cast(round(p2.global_elo_peak_last_50, 1) as string), 'N/A')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 23, 'label', ' • Median GLO',                 'profile', coalesce(cast(round(p2.global_elo_median_all, 1) as string), 'N/A')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 24, 'label', ' • Opp median GLO (weighted)',  'profile', coalesce(cast(round(p2.opponent_global_elo_median_weighted, 1) as string), 'N/A')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 25, 'label', ' • World rank (current) / Nation rank (current)', 'profile', concat(cast(p2.world_rank_current as string), ' / ', cast(p2.nation_rank_current as string))),

  named_struct('sort_order', 26, 'label', ' • World rank (peak) / Nation rank (peak)', 'profile', concat(cast(p2.world_rank_peak as string), ' / ', cast(p2.nation_rank_peak as string))),
  named_struct('sort_order', 27, 'label', ' • Selector rank', 'profile', CASE WHEN selector_ranks.selector_rank_global IS NOT NULL THEN concat('#', cast(selector_ranks.selector_rank_global as string), ' (Global)') ELSE 'N/A' END),



  named_struct('sort_order', 30, 'label', '🛡 Favourite race', 'profile', ''),

  named_struct('sort_order', 31, 'label', ' • Race',                 'profile', coalesce(p2.main_race_name, 'N/A')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 32, 'label', ' • Games with race',      'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.main_race_games_played as string), '0')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 33, 'label', ' • Race PPG',             'profile', coalesce(cast(round(p2.main_race_ppg, 2) as string), 'N/A')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 34, 'label', ' • Distinct races played', 'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.distinct_races_played as string), '0')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 35, 'label', ' • Median race PPG',       'profile', coalesce(cast(round(p2.median_race_ppg, 2) as string), 'N/A')),



  named_struct('sort_order', 40, 'label', '🔥 Streaks', 'profile', ''),

  named_struct('sort_order', 41, 'label', ' • Best win / Current win',             'profile', concat(cast(p2.best_win_streak as string), ' / ', cast(p2.current_win_streak as string))),

  named_struct('sort_order', 42, 'label', ' • Best unbeaten / Current unbeaten',   'profile', concat(cast(p2.best_unbeaten_streak as string), ' / ', cast(p2.current_unbeaten_streak as string)))

)) e AS row

ORDER BY

  p2.coach_id,

  row.sort_order;

datasets.name: 7e6b0b4b
queryLines:
-- DASHBOARD DATASET: coach_cumulative_results_daily_series (contract-aligned)
-- Source contract: naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_cumulative_results_daily_series
SELECT
  coach_id,
  coach_name,
  event_day,
  result,
  value
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_cumulative_results_daily_series
WHERE scope = 'GLOBAL'
  AND race_id = 0
ORDER BY
  coach_id,
  event_day,
  result_order;

datasets.name: f9e6a4b3
queryLines:
SELECT
  *
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_cumulative_results_last_n_daily_series
ORDER BY
  coach_id,
  event_day,
  result_order;

datasets.name: 92b53229
queryLines:
-- QUERY: Overall results (dashboard dataset)
SELECT
  coach_id,
  level,
  result,
  value
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_results_all_long
ORDER BY coach_id, level, result;

datasets.name: a59b382e
queryLines: -- Top races by games played, with optional race filter.
ORDER BY crp.games_played DESC, crp.race_id ASC
ORDER BY coach_id, games_played DESC, race_id;

datasets.name: 52345e69
queryLines:
SELECT
  coach_id,
  coach_name,
  game_week,
  glo_weekly,
  glo_running_peak,
  glo_running_median
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_global_elo_rating_daily_series
WHERE rating_system = 'NAF_ELO'
  AND (:start_date IS NULL OR game_week >= CAST(:start_date AS DATE))
  AND (:end_date IS NULL OR game_week <= CAST(:end_date AS DATE))
ORDER BY coach_id, game_week;

datasets.name: 7287b5e0
queryLines:
WITH top_races AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    coach_id,
    race_id
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_performance
  WHERE coach_id = :coach_id
    AND race_id <> 0
    AND games_played > 0
  ORDER BY games_played DESC, race_id ASC
  LIMIT CAST(COALESCE(:max_races, 6) AS INT)
)
SELECT
  coach_id,
  coach_name,
  race_id,
  race_name,
  game_week,
  elo_weekly,
  race_rank_by_games
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_elo_rating_daily_series
WHERE rating_system = 'NAF_ELO'
  AND coach_id = :coach_id
  AND (:start_date IS NULL OR game_week >= CAST(:start_date AS DATE))
  AND (:end_date IS NULL OR game_week <= CAST(:end_date AS DATE))
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM top_races tr
    WHERE tr.coach_id = coach_id
      AND tr.race_id = race_id
  )
ORDER BY coach_id, race_name, game_week;

datasets.name: 3660cd57
queryLines: --   Per-coach opponent "insights" table for dashboards (strength + outcomes vs opponents),
--   including all metrics exposed by the presentation contract.
--   gold_presentation (thin passthrough: do not rename/recompute fields here)
--   One row per (coach_id, category, opponent_coach_id) as defined by the presentation contract
CONCAT(CAST(games_played AS STRING), ' (', CAST(wins AS STRING), '-', CAST(draws AS STRING), '-', CAST(losses AS STRING), ')') AS record

datasets.name: 15dbc912
queryLines:
SELECT
  cor.coach_id,
  'median_glo' AS bin_scheme_id,
  'GLO Rating (Opponent Median)' AS bin_scheme_name_display,
  CASE 
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 150 THEN '0-150'
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 200 THEN '150-200'
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 250 THEN '200-250'
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 300 THEN '250-300'
    ELSE '300+'
  END AS bin_label,
  CASE 
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 150 THEN 1
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 200 THEN 2
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 250 THEN 3
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 300 THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END AS bin_index,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cor.opponent_coach_id) AS opponents_count,
  SUM(cor.games_played) AS games_played,
  SUM(cor.wins) AS wins,
  SUM(cor.draws) AS draws,
  SUM(cor.losses) AS losses,
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(cor.games_played) > 0 
    THEN ROUND(100.0 * (SUM(cor.wins) + 0.5 * SUM(cor.draws)) / SUM(cor.games_played), 1)
    ELSE 0
  END AS win_pct,
  SUM(cor.wins) + 0.5 * SUM(cor.draws) AS win_points,
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(cor.games_played) > 0 
    THEN ROUND((SUM(cor.wins) + 0.5 * SUM(cor.draws)) / SUM(cor.games_played), 2)
    ELSE 0
  END AS win_points_per_game
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_opponent_rating cor
LEFT JOIN naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_profile opp 
  ON cor.opponent_coach_id = opp.coach_id
WHERE cor.coach_id = :coach_id
GROUP BY cor.coach_id, bin_label, bin_index
ORDER BY bin_index

datasets.name: f732672a
queryLines:
SELECT
  cor.coach_id,
  CASE 
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 150 THEN '0-150'
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 200 THEN '150-200'
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 250 THEN '200-250'
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 300 THEN '250-300'
    ELSE '300+'
  END AS opponent_rating_bin,
  CASE 
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 150 THEN 1
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 200 THEN 2
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 250 THEN 3
    WHEN opp.global_elo_median_all < 300 THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END AS bin_order,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cor.opponent_coach_id) AS opponents_count,
  SUM(cor.games_played) AS games_played,
  SUM(cor.wins) AS wins,
  SUM(cor.draws) AS draws,
  SUM(cor.losses) AS losses,
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(cor.games_played) > 0 
    THEN ROUND(100.0 * (SUM(cor.wins) + 0.5 * SUM(cor.draws)) / SUM(cor.games_played), 1)
    ELSE 0
  END AS win_pct,
  SUM(cor.wins) + 0.5 * SUM(cor.draws) AS win_points,
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(cor.games_played) > 0 
    THEN ROUND((SUM(cor.wins) + 0.5 * SUM(cor.draws)) / SUM(cor.games_played), 2)
    ELSE 0
  END AS win_points_per_game
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_opponent_rating cor
LEFT JOIN naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_profile opp 
  ON cor.opponent_coach_id = opp.coach_id
WHERE cor.coach_id = :coach_id
GROUP BY cor.coach_id, opponent_rating_bin, bin_order
ORDER BY bin_order
